notes: MiniMax M2.7 AutoRound W4A16 on 4x Intel Arc Pro B70 via vLLM/XPU TP4. Local weights are Lasimeri/MiniMax-M2.7-int4-AutoRound submitted under base MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2.7. New warm-AOT XPU graph best: 72.37 output tok/s, 96.49 total tok/s at p512/n1536. Same quality policy as prior 71.46 run: no model weight, quantization, router precision, expert routing, KV dtype, sampler, speculative decoding, or power-limit changes. Delta is explicit --block-size 256 plus default-off MiniMax attention delayed-allreduce scheduling. Q/K RMS variance allreduces remain present. Warmup recovered despite ocloc/IGC rank-3 compiler warnings; measured pass direct-loaded the AOT cache.

engineFlags.commandSnippet: VLLM_MINIMAX_M2_ATTN_DELAY_ALLREDUCE=1 VLLM_XPU_ENABLE_XPU_GRAPH=1 VLLM_XPU_FORCE_GRAPH_WITH_COMM=1 VLLM_XPU_GRAPH_NOOP_COMM_CAPTURE=1 VLLM_XPU_USE_LLM_SCALER_MOE=1 CCL_TOPO_P2P_ACCESS=1 VLLM_CACHE_ROOT=/mnt/fast-ai/vllm-cache-exp/minimax-xpugraph-attndelay-block256-20260513T143351Z vllm bench throughput --backend vllm --async-engine --block-size 256 --model /mnt/fast-ai/llm-models/minimax-m2.7-int4-autoround --tokenizer /mnt/fast-ai/llm-models/minimax-m2.7-int4-autoround --trust-remote-code --dtype float16 --tensor-parallel-size 4 --distributed-executor-backend mp --max-model-len 2048 --max-num-batched-tokens 1024 --max-num-seqs 1 --dataset-name random --random-input-len 512 --random-output-len 1536 --random-range-ratio 0 --num-prompts 1 --disable-log-stats --compilation-config '{"use_inductor_graph_partition":true,"compile_sizes":[1],"cudagraph_mode":"PIECEWISE"}'
engineFlags.extraFlags: XPU/Level Zero; XPU graph enabled with local communicator graph-capture guard; B70 tuned MoE config E=256,N=384,dtype=int4_w4a16; llm-scaler u4 MoE decode path for x.shape<=4; VLLM_MINIMAX_M2_ATTN_DELAY_ALLREDUCE=1; --block-size 256; CCL_ATL_TRANSPORT=ofi; CCL_TOPO_P2P_ACCESS=1; use_inductor_graph_partition=true; compile_sizes=[1]; cudagraph_mode=PIECEWISE; --async-engine; AOT 7a930122cb9f1c8a67e6ae8a3543bfbd71795ee76045bbbcb9c1063aaaf242c1; Q/K RMS variance tensor_model_parallel_all_reduce preserved; warmup p512/n128 then measured p512/n1536; no power-limit change
